'''[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Luhar''' was a middle-aged [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] officer in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He commanded the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[Neelian]]'' in the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]].

{{Char-stub}}
